privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: How Online Office Tools handles privacy, cookies, and advertising.
privacy.body:
Last updated: July 18, 2026

Online Office Tools (“we”, “our”, “the site”) provides free browser-based utilities. We designed the product so that tool processing happens on your device whenever possible.

1. Tool processing
Text, files, and other inputs you enter into our tools are processed locally in your browser. We do not upload your tool content to our servers for processing, and we do not store tool drafts on our servers. Drafts may be kept temporarily in your browser’s session storage so language switches do not erase your work; those drafts are cleared when you close the tab.

2. Analytics and advertising
We may use Google AdSense to display ads. Google and its partners may use cookies or similar technologies to show relevant ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites. You can learn more and manage ad personalization at https://www.google.com/settings/ads and https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads.

3. Cookies
Essential cookies may be used for site operation. Advertising cookies from Google AdSense may be set when ads are shown. By using the site with ads enabled, you acknowledge these technologies as described in Google’s policies.

4. Contact pages and email
If you contact us by email, we will use your message only to respond to your inquiry.

5. Children’s privacy
The site is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

6. Changes
We may update this Privacy Policy. The “Last updated” date at the top will change when we do.

7. Contact
For privacy questions, use the Contact page on this site.

8. OCR language data
The OCR tool may download language model files from a public CDN (jsDelivr) to run recognition in your browser. Your images stay on your device and are not uploaded to our servers.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for Online Office Tools.
terms.body:
Last updated: July 18, 2026

By using Online Office Tools, you agree to these Terms of Service.

1. Service description
We provide free, browser-based utilities for text and related tasks. Features may change or be discontinued at any time.

2. Acceptable use
You agree not to misuse the site, attempt to disrupt service, use the tools for unlawful purposes, or violate applicable laws.

3. No warranty
The site is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. Results from tools may contain errors. You are responsible for verifying outputs before relying on them.

4. Limitation of liability
To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the site or tools.

5. Intellectual property
Site branding, layout, and original content are owned by Online Office Tools. You retain ownership of content you enter into tools.

6. Advertising
The site may display third-party advertisements, including Google AdSense.

7. Changes
We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

8. Contact
Questions about these terms can be sent via the Contact page.

about.title: About Online Office Tools
about.metaDescription: Learn about Online Office Tools — private, browser-based utilities.
about.body:
Online Office Tools is a collection of free utilities that run entirely in your browser.

Our mission is simple: give people fast office and developer helpers without forcing file uploads or server-side processing. That means better privacy by design, lower cost, and instant results.

What we focus on:
• Practical tools people search for every day (counting words, formatting JSON, generating passwords, and more)
• Clean, accessible interfaces that work on mobile and desktop
• Multilingual experiences so the same tools work in English and Turkish
• Transparent advertising that does not require selling your tool inputs

We continuously expand the catalog with tools that stay client-side and useful. If you have feedback, reach us through the Contact page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body:
Have a question, partnership idea, or tool suggestion? We’d love to hear from you.

Please email us and include enough detail for us to help. We aim to respond within a few business days.
